channel.title: BUbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Maps show snow totals, blizzard warnings for major winter storm
item.description: Blizzard warnings were issued Saturday for New York City, New Jersey, southern New England and coastal communities along the East Coast.

item.title: EU diplomats to meet Board of Peace director over Gaza's future
item.description: The European Union’s top diplomats are meeting with the director of the Board of Peace in Brussels

item.title: New York City hunkers down under blizzard warnings and a travel ban as winter storm hits Northeast
As more Americans embrace anxiety treatment, RFK Jr. derides medications
item.description: Robert F. Kennedy Jr. has criticized the broadening use of anxiety medications, but doctors and researchers say the MAHA movement is misrepresenting d...

item.title: 2/22: Face The Nation
item.description: This week on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," as the Supreme Court struck a blow to President Trump's tariffs, Margaret Brennan spoke to U.S. ...

item.title: 2/22/2026: Left Behind; South Africa's Refugees; Is That Art?
item.description: First, a report from inside the birthplace of food stamps. Then, inside Trump’s South Africa Afrikaner claims. And, the AI art divide: Revolutionary o...

item.title: Blizzard live updates: Historic storm strikes with 3 inches an hour, thundersnow
item.description: The governors of New York and New Jersey have issued states of emergency, and thousands of flights have been canceled.

item.title: Violence erupts after Mexican cartel leader "El Mencho" killed in federal operation
item.description: Mexico's Ministry of Defense security forces killed the leader of the Jalisco New Generation Cartel, Nemesio Rubén Oseguera Cervantes, known as "El Me...

item.title: WATCH: Demolition derby car crashes into crowd in Oklahoma
item.description: Several spectators were hurt in a crash at a demolition derby in Tulsa, Oklahoma, when of the cars broke through a safety barrier and went into the cr...

item.title: WATCH: Snowmobilers rescue moose from deep snowbank
item.description: A group of snowmobilers helped free a moose stuck in a deep snowbank in northern New Hampshire.

item.title: How Trump will use his State of the Union address to sell skeptical midterm voters on his plans
item.description: President Donald Trump’s State of the Union address on Tuesday is likely to be a test run of the message that Republicans will give to voters in Novem...

item.title: Mexico fears more violence after army kills leader of powerful Jalisco cartel
item.description: School was canceled in several Mexican states and local and foreign governments alike warned their citizens to stay inside following the army’s killin...

item.title: How bomb cyclones form and create dangerous conditions
